NationalPigsInABlanketDay.theme: National Pigs in a Blanket Day
NationalPigsInABlanketDay.haiku:
Savory hugs wrapped tight,
Porky treasures snug in dough,
Warm bites spark delight.
Happy #NationalPigsInABlanketDay from @ClamBakeSanta

WorldDayOfVeterinaryMedicine.haiku:
Gentle paws embraced,
Healing hands weave love's soft thread,
Whiskers twitch with joy.
Happy #WorldDayOfVeterinaryMedicine from @ClamBakeSanta

HappyBirthdayAnthonyTrollope.haiku:

Ink and dreams on parchment flow,
Celebrations bright!
#HappyBirthdayAnthonyTrollope from @ClamBakeSanta
